case_title: JOHNSON, RALPH vs. ZAMORA, EDWIN RODOLFO et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-21-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: AND FOR FAILURE TO FILE AN ORDER DECLARING CASE TO BE UNINSURED MOTORIST. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED IF THERE IS A FAILURE TO APPEAR., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAR-21-1996 TO APR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RALPH
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT ZAMORA, EDWIN RODOLFO

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-12-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: CASE WILL BE DISMISSED BY THE COURT IF THERE IS NO GOOD CAUSE FOR NOT APPEARING ON 1/18/96., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-10-1996 CONTINUED FROM DEC-12-1995 TO JAN-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, EDWIN RODOLFO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-13-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-24-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-13-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-13-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-18-1996, CONTINUED TO FEB-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED: CONTINUED FOR "UNINSURED MOTORIST" ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-20-1996, AND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES. HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
